class.name: hesfm/HESFMMapperNodelet
class.description:
HESFM Semantic Mapper Nodelet
Performs hierarchical evidential semantic-functional mapping from semantic point clouds. Uses multi-source uncertainty decomposition, Gaussian primitives with DST fusion, and adaptive kernel BKI.
Subscriptions: - semantic_cloud (sensor_msgs/PointCloud2): Input semantic point cloud
Publications: - semantic_map (sensor_msgs/PointCloud2): 3D semantic map - costmap (nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid): 2D navigation costmap - primitives (visualization_msgs/MarkerArray): Gaussian primitives - uncertainty_map (sensor_msgs/PointCloud2): Uncertainty visualization
Services: - reset_map (std_srvs/Empty): Reset the semantic map
Parameters: - map_frame (string, default: "map"): Map coordinate frame - resolution (double, default: 0.05): Voxel resolution in meters - num_classes (int, default: 40): Number of semantic classes - target_primitives (int, default: 128): Target primitive count

class.name: hesfm/SemanticCloudNodelet
class.description:
Semantic Point Cloud Generator Nodelet
Generates semantic point clouds from depth + segmentation images. Colors come from class palette (no RGB subscription needed). Supports optional per-pixel uncertainty via 3-topic or 2-topic sync.
Subscriptions: - depth/image_rect_raw (sensor_msgs/Image): Depth image - color/camera_info (sensor_msgs/CameraInfo): Camera intrinsics - semantic/image (sensor_msgs/Image): Semantic labels - semantic/uncertainty (sensor_msgs/Image): Per-pixel uncertainty (optional)
Publications: - semantic_cloud (sensor_msgs/PointCloud2): Semantic point cloud
Parameters: - downsample_factor (int, default: 2): Downsampling factor - min_depth (double, default: 0.06): Minimum depth in meters - max_depth (double, default: 6.0): Maximum depth in meters - use_uncertainty (bool, default: true): Subscribe to uncertainty topic - default_uncertainty (double, default: 0.3): Fallback when uncertainty disabled
